# Klyve: Agentic SDLC Orchestrator
> Local-first, autonomous software development factory for solo developers and scaling teams.

## Technical Metadata
- **Identity:** Klyve (Agentic Engineering Tool)
- **Framework:** Python 3.10+, PySide6 (Qt)
- **Licensing:** Source code under MIT License; Brand/Trademark rights reserved by Mario J. Lewis.
- **Privacy:** Local-first. No background telemetry or cloud data sync.

## Project Structure & Setup
- [README.md](./README.md): Main landing page, screenshots, and visual overview.
- [requirements.txt](./requirements.txt): Python dependency list.
- [EULA.txt](./EULA.txt): Full licensing terms and conditions.
- `main.py`: Primary entry point for the application.
- `/src`: Core logic, including the agentic engine and self-healing protocols.
- `/screenshots`: Visual references for the GUI and dashboard.
- `/agents`: Individual agents.
- `/data/prompts`: Natural language prompts used by the agents.

## Core Agentic Capabilities
- **Deterministic Orchestration:** Translates raw requirements into structured SDLC artifacts (Architecture, Sprint Plans).
- **Iterative Code Correction:** Capable of reviewing its own generated code and logs to identify bugs. It supports both context-triggered self-correction and user-initiated "Critique & Revise" loops following test failures.
- **Human-in-the-Loop:** Designed as a "Senior Partner" interface where the human reviews AI-synthesized output before commit.

## Development Requirements
- **System Binary:** Graphviz must be installed and added to the System PATH for architecture rendering.
- **Connectivity:** Requires user-provided API keys for LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Deepseek).

## Optional Resources
- [USER_GUIDE.md](./USER_GUIDE.md): Detailed usage instructions and workflow explanations.

## Optional Resources
- [The "Manager" Philosophy](https://klyve.online/about.html): Why structured state management beats probabilistic chat windows for software engineering.

- [FAQ](https://klyve.online/faq.html): Strategic answers regarding Security, IP, and Factory Logic.
